stemHtml: The pilot of an aircraft is executing an approach to a flat runway at the end of gradually rising terrain. The pilot will may experience the illusion of...

options.a: pitching down and has a risk of stalling his aircraft when he attempts to correct his attitude.
options.b: coming in high and has a risk of flying too low on approach.
options.c: coming in low and has a risk of landing further down the runway.
options.d: flying slower than he actually does and has a risk of overrunning the paved runway surface.
